pubmed_links: [Li et al. (2022) In-depth analysis reveals complex molecular aetiology in a cohort of idiopathic cerebral palsy](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34077496/); [Sun et al. (2024) Wybutosine hypomodification of tRNAphe activates HERVK and impairs neuronal differentiation](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/38706838/)
summary: TYW1 encodes a tRNA wybutosine-synthesizing enzyme whose loss causes primary microcephaly, intellectual disability, and motor deficits by impairing neuronal proliferation and migration; additionally, TYW1 deficiency activates endogenous retrovirus HERVK and disrupts neuronal differentiation in human stem cell models. (emerging evidence)
